mapper.select: SELECT W.ID , W.WS_NM , W.WS_DESC , W.WS_OWNER_ID , WU.AUTHORITY , W.REGIST_DT FROM WORKSPACE W INNER JOIN WORKSPACE_USER WU ON WU.WS_ID = W.ID WHERE WU.USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY W.REGIST_DT ASC

SELECT W.ID , W.WS_NM , W.WS_DESC , W.WS_OWNER_ID , WU.AUTHORITY , W.REGIST_DT FROM WORKSPACE W INNER JOIN WORKSPACE_USER WU ON WU.WS_ID = W.ID WHERE W.ID = #{workspaceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND WU.USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT WU.USER_ID AS MEMBER_ID , U.USER_NM , U.USER_IMAGE_URI , WU.AUTHORITY FROM WORKSPACE_USER WU INNER JOIN SWC_USER U ON U.USER_ID = WU.USER_ID WHERE WU.WS_ID = #{workspaceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY WU.REGIST_DT ASC
